name: Apple Filled Squash Halves
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Cut each squash in half and remove seeds and fibers. Place cut sides down in an ungreased baking pan.
3. Add water until it reaches a depth of 1/4 inch. Bake, uncovered, for 30-40 minutes or until tender.
4. While the squash bakes, cook and stir meat in a large skillet until brown. Remove from heat and stir in salt, cinnamon, chopped apples, and raisins.
5. When squash is cooked, turn cut sides up and transfer to a platter. Drain any remaining liquid and dry pan.
6. Scoop pulp into shells, creating a 1/4-inch thick shell around the edges. Season with salt.
7. Mash pulp and mix in meat mixture. Return to shells, filling them full. Sprinkle brown sugar on each.
8. Drizzle melted butter over top. Bake uncovered for 20-30 minutes or until apples are tender.
9. Serve hot.
